situation: Derived fix from audit-2026-07-06-020 finding M-004: TTLCache.store in src/cache.js was a Map with set-only semantics — get() returned stale marker but never deleted expired entries. Long-running server leaked ~33 cities × (prediction + grid + contour) entries per day with no max-size cap. Memory monotonically grows until OOM or restart.
action: Added three defenses to TTLCache: (1) periodic sweep() every 5 min via setInterval with unref() so it doesn't keep process alive; (2) maxEntries constructor param (default 5000) enforced in set() — triggers sweep then drops oldest-by-insertion-order if still at cap; (3) destroy() method for graceful shutdown/tests. Backward-compatible: existing callers (routes.js cache.set/get/setLoading/clearLoading) unchanged. Single-file route-fix per opt-worktree reuse rule.
outcome_evidence: Commit d969b03 on auto/opt-cache-1783337411, pushed to origin/auto/opt-cache-1783337411. Diff: +39/-1 lines in src/cache.js. Worktree file verified contains sweep/maxEntries/destroy additions. No API surface change (constructor second arg optional with default).
next_suggestion: 派生 fix M-005 (storage_state JSON 0644 → chmod 0600 + flock) — 同 audit-2026-07-06-020，scripts/post_xhs_browseruse.py 单文件 route-fix
派生 fix L-002 (Playwright --no-sandbox unconditional → container-detect gate) — scripts/post_xhs_browseruse.py 或 playwright launch wrapper
M-004 worktree 待人工审：bash scripts/opt-worktree.sh /home/admin/workspace/sunset-prediction merge opt-cache-1783337411

audit_findings.finding: TTLCache.set() only appends to Map, never evicts. get() returns stale:true but leaves entry in store. No max-size bound. Long-running Express server accumulates ~33 cities × 3 data types × N days of stale entries → unbounded memory growth.
audit_findings.remediation: Add periodic sweep (setInterval with unref) + maxEntries cap with oldest-key eviction on overflow. Implemented in this case.
